race.comment: MYSTICAL (8) is a talented filly who resumes. Finished second two-back to Paradoxium at Wyong last December. Kept fresh from the wide gate with a battling tenth to Unit Five over 1200m in the Magic Millions 2yo Classic at the Gold Coast. Back with the one trial and has the class to overcome the sticky gate. TI AMO (10) is a two-year-old filly by Zoustar from Platinum Bullet on debut for the Bjorn Baker yard. Recent trials had merit and stays in the mix. SPICE TRAIL (9) I Am Invincible filly from Mabkhara on debut for the Kris Lees yard. Effortless trial winner at Scone over 900m on April 1. Gets map favours and must be kept safe. HANDLOOM (5) third-up for this with a fitness edge from the inside gate. Just under a month between runs when she knocked up late to run fourth over 1000m at Gosford. Genuine each way player.
